hero.headline: Your voice. Your practice. Your transformation.
hero.subheadline: waQup creates personalized affirmations, meditations, and rituals in your own voice — scientifically designed to rewire your subconscious.
hero.earlyAccess: Early access · No card · Practice free

tell.title: Tell us your intention
tell.description: Have a conversation with our AI guide to shape your personalized practice.

create.title: Your voice. Your words.
create.description: Record your practice in your own voice, or use our AI voice. Either way, it's yours.

transform.title: Practice and transform
transform.description: Listen whenever you need it. Consistent practice rewires your subconscious over time.

voiceFirst.title: Voice-first
voiceFirst.description: Your own voice speaking your own words is the most powerful form of identity encoding.

personalized.title: Fully personalized
personalized.description: Not generic content — practices shaped to your specific intent, context, and goals.

scientificallyDesigned.title: Scientifically designed
scientificallyDesigned.description: Built on neuroplasticity research, brainwave entrainment, and identity-based change science.

waitlist.subtitle: Be among the first to transform your mind with voice.
waitlist.success: You're on the list! We'll be in touch.

footerTagline: Your voice. Your transformation. Scientifically designed to rewire the subconscious patterns that shape who you are.

comingSoon.subtitle: We're working on something special. Stay tuned.

getQs.title: Get Qs
getQs.subtitle: Credits to power your creation journey.

forTeachers.title: For Teachers & Coaches
forTeachers.subtitle: Give your clients personalized voice practices.

landing.headline: Your practice, in your voice.
landing.subheadline: Create personalised affirmations, meditations, and rituals through conversation — then practice them free, forever.
landing.earlyAccess: Early access · No card required · Practice free always
landing.sectionTitle: The only practice that's actually about your life
landing.sectionSubtitle: You created it. It's in your voice. It reflects your exact intention. That's why it works.

coreValue.title: Built for transformation
coreValue.subtitle: Not another meditation app. A personal practice studio that works the way you do.

yourVoice.title: Your voice, not generic audio
yourVoice.desc: Record once. Every practice sounds like you, speaking to yourself.

aiHelps.title: AI helps you create, not replace you
aiHelps.desc: Tell the orb your intention. Review, tweak, and own every word.

replay.title: Practices you actually replay
replay.desc: Made for you. In your voice. Built for daily use.

minutes.title: Takes minutes, not hours
minutes.desc: Create in under 5 minutes. Practice free forever.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps. Your voice. Your transformation.

step1.title: Tell the orb what you're working on
step1.desc: A short conversation shapes your intention into a personalised script.

step2.title: Review and record in your own voice
step2.desc: Adjust the words, then record. Or use AI voice cloning. Either way, it's yours.

step3.title: Replay it daily
step3.desc: Listen whenever you need it. Practice is always free.

differentiation.title: Not another meditation app
differentiation.subtitle: The difference is your voice.
differentiation.yourVoiceVs: Your own voice speaking your intentions

pillars.title: Three practices, three depths
pillars.subtitle: Each does something different. Use what you need, when you need it.

affirmations.title: Affirmations
affirmations.desc: Short statements that rewire beliefs. Shifts self-concept — use for morning motivation, confidence, limiting beliefs.

meditations.title: Meditations
meditations.desc: Guided journeys into calm states. Induces relaxation and focus — use for stress relief, sleep, clarity.

rituals.title: Rituals
rituals.desc: Structured identity-encoding ceremonies. Anchors values and new identity — use for major transitions and life changes.

benefitsSection.title: Why waQup works
benefitsSection.benefit1: Hear yourself say what you most need to hear
benefitsSection.benefit3: Practice free forever — creation only uses credits
benefitsSection.benefit4: Works in minutes, compounds for life

voice.title: Your voice. Not someone else's.
voice.description: Record 60 seconds. waQup clones your voice — so every practice sounds like you, speaking to yourself from a place of strength.

create.title: You create it — AI just helps
create.description: Tell the orb what you're working on. It turns your intention into a personalised script you review, adjust, and own completely.

practiceFree.title: Practice is always free
practiceFree.description: Once you've created it, replay your content as many times as you like. Credits are only used during creation — never during practice.

threePractices.title: Three distinct practices
threePractices.description: Affirmations to shift your self-concept. Meditations to access deeper states. Rituals to encode new identity. Each does something different.

dailyRhythm.title: Built for your daily rhythm
dailyRhythm.description: Pin your most important practice. See your streak. Designed to become part of your morning in under 5 minutes.

benefits: Hear yourself say what you most need to hear

Practice free, forever — no hidden limits
